title: Delhi Uttam Nagar clashes LIVE: RAF deployed amid heightened tensions after man killed in Holi clashes
description: Delhi Uttam Nagar clashes LIVE updates: To prevent tensions in Delhi's Uttam Nagar amid ongoing protests, security has been heightened to maintain law and order situation. Dwarka district DCP Kushal Pal Singh said that police have appealed people of both the communities to maintain peace and order.
